lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened? I rubbed that coin and everything went black!

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: Who are you? You're not the hero I gave my token to!

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: How did you get that coin you used to summon me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I took it from the dead body of a black dragon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't realise what it would do if I rubbed it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who, or what, are you anyway?

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: My name is K'klik. I am a Fairy Dragon.

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: One of the last surviving members of my race, I fear.

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: Enough of that: you summoned me, so how can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I don't understand.

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: The person who holds my token can summon me by rubbing it.

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: They then have the right to request one thing of me before returning my token.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I can ask one thing of you?

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: That's right. What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a horse, please.

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: No horses in Gielinor. Try again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I wish for some xp?

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: Sorry, can't help. You'll have to ask the genie for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I just keep your token for when I really need it, please?

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: I suppose that seems fair. Alright, just call me when you need me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please flambe this creme brulee for me.

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: Sure, that's easy.

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: That brûlée needs some more work before it's ready for flambéing.

lines.speaker: K'klik
lines.text: Call me again when it's ready.
